title: Badli FINAL Election Result 2024: Kuldeep Vats of INC Wins by...
text:
Badli FINAL Election Result 2024: Kuldeep Vats of INC Wins by...
Detailed election result of Badli constituency in the 2024 Haryana Assembly election. Kuldeep Vats is the new Badli MLA.
Kuldeep Vats (INC) is the winner and elected as the MLA in the 2024 Badli Assembly election defeating Omprakash Dhankar (BJP) by a margin of 16,820 votes (12.71%) according to the data published by the Election Commission of India on October 8, 2024 for the 2024 Haryana Assembly election.
Badli detailed election result 2024
- 1. Kuldeep Vats (Indian National Congress), 68160 votes (51.52%)
- 2. Omprakash Dhankar (Bharatiya Janata Party), 51340 votes (38.81%)
- 3. Ajit Gulia Jeete (Independent), 10820 votes (8.18%)
- 4. Harpal Singh (Aam Aadmi Party), 601 votes (0.45%)
- 5. Krishan Kumar (Jannayak Janta Party), 519 votes (0.39%)
- 6. NOTA (None of the Above), 411 votes (0.31%)
- 7. Sandeep (Independent), 201 votes (0.15%)
- 8. Amit Kumar (Independent), 124 votes (0.09%)
- 9. Virender Singh Bilu (Independent), 81 votes (0.06%)
- 10. Poonam (Independent), 43 votes (0.03%)
Past election results in Badli
In the 2019 Haryana Assembly elections, Kuldeep Vats of INC won in this seat defeating Omprakash Dhankhar of BJP by a margin of 11,245 which was 09.29% of the total votes cast for the seat. INC had a vote share of 37.54% in 2019 in this seat.
In the 2014 Haryana Assembly elections, Om Parkash Dhankar of BJP won in this seat defeating Kuldeep Vats of IND by a margin of 9,266 which was 8.13% of the total votes cast for the seat. BJP had a vote share of 36.47% in 2014 in this seat.
In the 2009 Haryana Assembly elections, Naresh Kumar of INC won in this seat defeating Brijender Singh Chahar of IND by a margin of 13,358 which was 14.79% of the total votes cast for the seat. INC had a vote share of 36.73% in 2009 in this seat.
Badli Assembly seat – Lok Sabha results
Badli Assembly constituency is part of 7. Rohtak (General) Lok Sabha constituency. In the 2024 Lok Sabha elections, INC was the leading party in this assembly segment. The Rohtak Lok Sabha seat was won by Deepender Singh Hooda of INC defeating Dr. Arvind Kumar Sharma of BJP.
In the 2019 Lok Saba polls, INC led in this assembly segment. The Rohtak Lok Sabha seat was won by Arvind Kumar Sharma of BJP beating Deepender Singh Hooda of INC.
In 2014, INLD was ahead in this particular assembly segment and the Rohtak Lok Sabha constituency was won by Deepender Singh Hooda of INC defeating Om Parkash Dhankar of BJP.
In the 2009 Parliamentary elections, INC was the leading party in the Badli assembly segment while the Rohtak Lok Sabha constituency was won by Deepender Singh of INC defeating Nafe Singh Rathee of INLD.
Voter turnout in Badli
According to data released by the Election Commission of India, in the 2024 Haryana Assembly elections, the voter turnout in Badli constituency was 70.02%. In 2019, this seat registered a turnout of 66.60%, while it was 70.87% in 2014 and 65.53% in 2009. The estimated turnout in 2024 was -3.42% compared to the 2019 turnout.
List of contesting candidates and candidate profiles
Nine candidates were in the fray for the Badli Assembly seat in the 2024 Haryana Assembly election.
Brief profiles of candidates contesting from Badli in the 2024 elections sourced from the affidavits submitted by the candidates with the Election Commission of India and as analysed by the Association of Democratic Reforms (ADR):
- Ajit Gulia Jeete, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 47 years; Profession: Businessman ( Sole Proprietor at Adarsh Builders & 25% Share Holder at Adarshbadli Construction Pvt ltd.; Education: Graduate; Total assets: Rs 34.7 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Amit Kumar, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 40 years; Profession: Advocate; Education: Post Graduate; Total assets: Rs 1.4 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Harpal Singh, Aam Aadmi Party (AAP); Gender: Male; Age: 29 years; Profession: Teacher; Education: Graduate; Total assets: Rs 3 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Krishan Kumar, Jannayak Janta Party (JJP); Gender: Male; Age: 52 years; Profession: Business and Agriculture; Education: 10th Pass; Total assets: Rs 2.2 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Kuldeep Vats, Indian National Congress (INC); Gender: Male; Age: 49 years; Profession: Politician; Education: 10th Pass; Total assets: Rs 9.6 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 1.
- Omprakash Dhankar, Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP); Gender: Male; Age: 63 years; Profession: Served as member of legislative assembly, Haryana and Cabinet Minister Govt. of Haryana from year 2014 to 2019.; Education: Post Graduate; Total assets: Rs 3.3 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Poonam, Independent (IND); Gender: Female; Age: 44 years; Profession: Housewife; Education: 12th Pass; Total assets: Rs 34.7 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Sandeep, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 43 years; Profession: Agriculturist; Education: Graduate; Total assets: Rs 2.3 crore; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
- Virender Singh Bilu, Independent (IND); Gender: Male; Age: 52 years; Profession: Supplier; Education: 10th Pass; Total assets: Rs 1.5 lakh; No. of declared criminal cases: 0.
